title: System and Modules Description
description:
The modular design of the counter allows for configurations tailored to user needs and space requirements. Available modules can be used to create straight or corner configurations.
RC801 Straight module 80 - expandable or as a free-standing module RC801FS.
RC802 Straight module 120 - expandable or as a free-standing module RC802FS.
RC803 Universal (left/right) Corner Module - expandable.
Notice: The module is equipped with 2 x side panels, which constitute the ends of the counter. In case of connecting the Universal Corner Module to another module, the side panel is not used.
RC804L Low module (left) with countertop for serving individuals using wheelchairs, for system expansion. Available only as an end module (left version).
RC804R Low module (right) with countertop for serving individuals using wheelchairs, for system expansion. Available only as an end module (right version).
